stemHtml: A pilot, aiming for a flight at the Maximum Structural Take-off Mass (MSTOM), anticipates requiring either 3300 or 3200 pounds of fuel. Upon shutdown, they find 830 pounds of remaining fuel with a specific gravity of 0.82. How many liters of fuel are required during refueling?

options.a: Approximately 1365 liters, if planning for 3300 pounds of fuel.
options.b: Approximately 1365 liters, if planning for 3200 pounds of fuel.
options.c: Approximately 830 liters regardless of the planned fuel quantity.
options.d: Approximately 2470 liters for either planned fuel quantity.
